title: Federico Andrés Corigliano
text: Home * People * Federico Andrés Corigliano Federico Andrés Corigliano , an Argentinian computer scientist and as computer chess programmer author of the chess engine Chispa , which was one of the first Chess960 engines, and the open source engine HeavyChess [1] .
